prompt: Generate new low-poly industrial game assets. Use the reference image as a guide for the clean geometric style, variety of buildings, and grid-like collection layout suitable for computer graphics.
prompt_refined: Generate new low-poly industrial game assets that emulate the visual style and collection layout from image 1. The assets should feature a clean, crisp geometric design with sharp edges and simplified forms. Use a color palette predominantly of white, grey, and black, accented by bright orange and yellow, similar to image 1. Include a variety of industrial structures such as factory buildings, power plants, processing units, storage facilities, and machinery. Each asset should be presented modularly on an individual square base, arranged in a neat, grid-like collection layout, against a plain, light brown background, suitable for computer graphics.
objects: Assets with clean, crisp geometric design, sharp edges, and simplified forms
Color palette predominantly of white, grey, and black, accented by bright orange and yellow
Variety of industrial structures including factory buildings, power plants, processing units, storage facilities, and machinery
Assets presented on individual square bases
Assets arranged in a neat, grid-like collection layout
